creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #3)
sonarqube seems not to be directly vulnerable:
https://community.sonarsource.com/t/sonarqube-sonarcloud-and-the-log4j-vulnerability/54721
but a mitigation can be added to the sonarqube port that is described in this link.
